Bash(export UV_CACHE_DIR='.uv-cache' && uv run python -c "
import pandas as pd
s = pd.read_csv\('temp/branch_router_validation/microstructure_shadow_60win/microstructure_summary.csv'\)
for bucket in ['20win', '40win', '60win']:
    sub = s[s['bucket']==bucket].sort_values\('delta_mean', ascending=False\).head\(5\)
    print\(f'\\n=== {bucket} top 5 by delta_mean ==='\)
    print\(sub[['variant','delta_mean','delta_q10','delta_worst','negative_delta_count','accepted_swaps']].to_string\(index=False\)\)

print\('\\n=== PASS CHECK: variants with d20>0, d40>=0, d60>=0, q20>=0, q40>=0, q60>=0 ==='\)
merged = s[s['bucket']=='20win'][['variant','delta_mean','delta_q10','negative_delta_count']].rename\(
    columns={'delta_mean':'d20','delta_q10':'q20','negative_delta_count':'neg20'}\)
m40 = s[s['bucket']=='40win'][['variant','delta_mean','delta_q10','negative_delta_count']].rename\(
    columns={'delta_mean':'d40','delta_q10':'q40','negative_delta_count':'neg40'}\)
m60 = s[s['bucket']=='60win'][['variant','delta_mean','delta_q10','negative_delta_count']].rename\(
    columns={'delta_mean':'d60','delta_q10':'q60','negative_delta_count':'neg60'}\)
merged = merged.merge\(m40, on='variant'\).merge\(m60, on='variant'\)
passed = merged[\(merged['d20']>0\) & \(merged['d40']>=0\) & \(merged['d60']>=0\) & 
                \(merged['q20']>=0\) & \(merged['q40']>=0\) & \(merged['q60']>=0\)]
print\(f'Variants passing all checks: {len\(passed\)}'\)
if not passed.empty:
    print\(passed.to_string\(index=False\)\)
else:
    print\('NO VARIANT PASSES ALL REQUIRED CHECKS'\)
" 2>&1)
